title: Try, Try Again
lesson: If you fall down, you can get back up and try again.
prompts: On a sunny park path — green grass, leafy trees, warm sunlight — the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image is sitting on a little red pedal bike with black training wheels, both round pedals and the crank clearly visible on the near side, both feet resting on the pedals, wearing a snug safety helmet, with an excited smile. {GENDER_M_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} stands nearby, one hand resting gently on the bike, smiling encouragingly. Eye-level medium shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

On a sunny park path — green grass, leafy trees, warm sunlight — the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image is wobbling on the little red pedal bike with black training wheels, both round pedals and the crank clearly visible on the near side, wearing the safety helmet, leaning slightly to one side with a surprised expression. {GENDER_M_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} stands nearby, reaching out a hand, looking watchful and ready to help. Eye-level three-quarter shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

On a sunny park path — green grass, leafy trees, warm sunlight — after a gentle tumble, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image is sitting safely on the green grass a full step in front of an empty little red pedal bike toppled on its side, the bike's black training wheels, round pedals, and crank clearly visible, still wearing the safety helmet, with a tiny pout but no tears. {GENDER_M_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} kneels nearby, leaning in kindly and offering an open hand. Eye-level medium-wide shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

On a sunny park path — green grass, leafy trees, warm sunlight — the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image is standing on the grass with both feet flat on the ground, wearing the safety helmet, bending slightly to brush grass off one knee with both hands and a determined little smile; a separate empty little red pedal bike with black training wheels rests upright beside them, both round pedals and the crank clearly visible on the near side. {GENDER_M_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} crouches nearby, clapping and cheering them on warmly. Eye-level medium-wide shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

On a sunny park path — green grass, leafy trees, warm sunlight — the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image is riding the little red pedal bike with black training wheels a short way, both round pedals and the crank clearly visible on the near side, wearing the safety helmet, beaming with delight, feet lifted from the ground. {GENDER_M_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} stands in the background, cheering with both arms raised. Eye-level three-quarter shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

On a sunny park path — green grass, leafy trees, golden afternoon light — the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image is standing proudly beside the little red pedal bike with black training wheels, both round pedals and the crank clearly visible on the near side, one hand resting on the handlebar, wearing the safety helmet, with a big happy smile. {GENDER_M_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} kneels nearby, cheering and giving a thumbs-up with a proud, delighted expression. Eye-level medium shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.
gists: On a sunny park path, the child sits on a little red pedal bike with training wheels wearing a helmet, excited, while the father rests a hand on the bike encouragingly — ready to ride.
On the park path, the child wobbles on the red pedal bike with training wheels, leaning to one side with a surprised look, while the father reaches out, ready to help.

On the park path after a gentle tumble, the child sits safely on the grass beside the red pedal bike with training wheels, showing a small pout but no tears, while the father kneels offering an open hand.
On the park path, the child stands back up beside the red pedal bike with training wheels, brushing off grass with a determined smile, while the father crouches clapping and cheering — trying again.
On the park path, the child rides the red pedal bike with training wheels a short way, beaming, while the father further back cheers with arms raised — the child succeeds.
On the park path in golden light, the child stands proudly by the red pedal bike with training wheels, grinning big, while the father kneels giving a proud thumbs-up — never gave up.
texts: {NAME} sat on a little red bike, helmet on tight. "I'm going to ride!" said {NAME}. "You can do it," said Dad, smiling beside the bike.
{NAME} pushed off — but wibble, wobble! The bike tipped to one side. "Whoa!" cried {NAME}.
Down {NAME} went onto the soft green grass. It didn't hurt, but {NAME} felt a little sad. "I can't do it," {NAME} sighed.
Dad held out his hand. "You can try again," he said kindly. "Okay," said {NAME}, standing up and brushing off the grass.
{NAME} pushed off once more and — was riding! "Look at me go!" laughed {NAME}. "Hooray!" cheered Dad, arms up high.
{NAME} stood proudly by the red bike with a great big grin. "You did it!" said Dad. "I never gave up!" said {NAME}.
